# Reusable component contracts

Use these component contracts so all pages stay visually and structurally consistent.

## Hero

- Required structure: heading, lead text, and at least one CTA.
- Required classes: `.hero`, `.hero-grid`, `.lede`, `.cta-row`.
- Rules: include a primary action and keep lead copy under 3 short paragraphs.

## Notice

- Required class: `.notice-experimental`.
- Rules: use for transparent status messages, not marketing copy.

## Card grid

- Required classes: `.cards`, `.card`.
- Rules: card titles should be parallel sentence case; descriptions should stay under 2 lines where possible.

## Prose sections

- Required class: `.prose` for long-form text blocks.
- Rules: keep line length readable and avoid nested list depth beyond one level.

## Accessibility checks for all components

- Heading hierarchy must not skip levels.
- Interactive targets should be at least 44x44 px on touch surfaces.
- Links must have descriptive text.
